components.label: Dual H-bridge motor driver section
recommended_checks: Measure VMOTOR at J_LOGIC under no load and with one motor connected
Confirm motor harness pairs are not shorted to ground before splice

components.label: Left and right geared DC motors with harnesses

salvage_candidates.label: RC toy dual motor driver stage
recommended_checks: Measure VMOTOR at J_LOGIC under no load and with one motor connected
Do not connect logic until VMOTOR rail is measured
Verify battery section chemistry before reusing J_BATT
